name: ASSIGNEES_BY_FUNCTION
description: Assignees by functional category. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (f:Functional_of_Target {name: $functional_of_target})<-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Which companies have entered target-pair combinations involving the Malignant_Cell_Surface_Target category?
Which companies have entered target-pair combinations involving the Treg_Modulator_Target category?
Which companies have entered target-pair combinations involving the PostTranslational_Modification_Enzyme_Target��PTM�� category?
